name: Sesame Shrimp Toasts
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Cooked peeled medium-size shrimp, thawed if frozen
1 Piece ginger root, peeled and grated (3/4")
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain shrimp well on paper towels.
2. Mince shrimp finely. In a bowl, mix shrimp with ginger, garlic and cornstarch. Lightly whisk egg white with a fork (just enough to make frothy) and add to shrimp. Stir in Five Spice Powder, salt and pepper; mix well.
3. Press shrimp mixture evenly and firmly onto slices of bread. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and press on firmly.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet. Lower the bread slices, shrimp-side down, into hot oil and fry 2-3 minutes or until golden brown. Keep slices immersed in oil.
5. Drain on paper towels.
6. Cut into fingers and garnish with green onion daisies.
